prediction_sources.evidence_statement: Raw amino-acid sequence for the RCSB polymer entity.

RCSB title: BOVINE MITOCHONDRIAL F1-ATPASE AT 100K. Entity description: BOVINE MITOCHONDRIAL F1-ATPASE. Organism: BOS TAURUS; Bos taurus. Polymer composition: heteromeric protein. Sequence-derived marks: sequence-derived hydrophobic closure tendency; public metadata indicates multiple polymer instances or molecule copies; withheld discovery hints: hard_topology_word_withheld:soluble_beta_barrel_vs_membrane_barrel. Coordinates, contacts, distance maps, ligand geometry, native topology, and post-seal validation labels are unopened before the prediction hash.

V69 E65 metadata context marks: assembly_context cofactor_context ligand_context metal_context nucleotide_context oligomer_context partner_copy_context. Known E65 marks are allowed; hard-topology discovery labels are withheld from prediction. Coordinates, contacts, ligand geometry, native topology, and post-seal validation labels are blocked before sealing.
